scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix backend install --include=dev
scripts.build:all: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n be,fe -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.deploy: npm run install:all && npm run build:all && npm run pm2:start
